title: oxydectes cneorifolia
intro: Oxydectes cneorifolia, also known as the Sea Spurry, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Oxydectes cneorifolia include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to leverage its medicinal properties.
